## Checklist

- [ ] The title and commits follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-convention).
- [ ] If behavior changes, I updated `spec/specification.md`.
- [ ] I updated the documentation in `docs/` if applicable.
- [ ] The implementation compiles and passes its tests / the CI smoke test.
- [ ] (If applicable) I updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
